g.text: +submitIncident(hazard : HazardType, location : GpsCoordinate, description : String, victimCount : int) : Incident
+Incident(hazardType : HazardType, gpsLocation : GpsCoordinate, description : String, victimCount : int)
Presentation tier: App (a JavaFX Application) hosts the navigation
MenuBar; ReportController / DispatchController are bound to report.fxml /
dispatch.fxml (authored in Scene Builder), styled by drs.css. All eight
partner-agency stubs named in Assessment One's NFR-O04 are implemented;
IPartnerAgency remains the open-closed extension point for any ninth agency.
Persistence is out of scope: AppContext is the prototype's only shared
id means the Responder is available.
